message:
chore: update Cargo.lock with refreshed dependency versions

Routine dependency lock file update reflecting transitive dependency
version bumps from upstream crate releases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1485,7 +1485,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "libc",
  "option-ext",
  "redox_users",
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -1661,7 +1661,7 @@ source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "39cab71617ae0d63f51a36d69f866391735b51691dbda63cf6f96d042b63efeb"
 dependencies = [
  "libc",
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -2044,7 +2044,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "frankensearch-embed"
-version = "0.1.2"
+version = "0.1.3"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
  "dirs",
@@ -2397,7 +2397,7 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "fsqlite-vfs"
-version = "0.1.2"
+version = "0.1.3"
 dependencies = [
  "advisory-lock",
  "asupersync",
@@ -4239,7 +4239,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "portable-atomic",
  "portable-atomic-util",
  "serde_core",
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]

- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]

 checksum = "7d8fae84b431384b68627d0f9b3b1245fcf9f46f6c0e3dc902e9dce64edd1967"
 dependencies = [
  "libc",
- "windows-sys 0.61.2",
+ "windows-sys 0.59.0",
 ]

  "once_cell",

 ]
